textByHash.6f6d3e658a77806b872e74f6913e1dd393177fb1: Ah, hello there. Nice to see an outsider for a change. Are you busy? I have a problem.
textByHash.d1ad3f22e52a8f8374df8cc56c746ca80581258c: It's my son Hudon, he's always getting into trouble. The boy's convinced there's hidden treasure in the river and I'm a bit worried about his safety, the poor lad can't even swim.
textByHash.9d0a4a9930b2e89f1ec5fda000021309bfc80bac: Would you? You are kind. You can use the small raft out back if you wish, do be careful, the current down stream is very strong.
textByHash.a4a85bd51fe76bf3b2c404d7aa86ee740dc2d6fa: Hello adventurer, have you seen my boy yet?
textByHash.94c4bdd9d5233c3fbdcfded9b293344e840a41fa: I do hope so, you can't be too careful these days.
textByHash.1929bbc19f7cf828e3002e1da00a56a0e2c9405a: Well hello, you're still around then.
textByHash.093704d7be1d3b01154c6bc2d966f07e7f6949f0: Yes he told me, the foolish lad came in drenched to the bone, he had fallen into the waterfall, lucky he wasn't killed! Now he can spend the rest of the summer in his room.
textByHash.a54d65a871a0a60c3c56ac4b9e55da28007baac0: Why don't you visit the tourist centre south of the waterfall?
textByHash.70892e6153cc05a71a6f32f5e5d0e4343293f6c5: Well hello again brave adventurer, are you enjoying the tranquil scenery of these parts?
textByHash.ab5d8107cb29ad4461d136102d65295726fca3cc: Well I'm glad to hear it The authorities wanted to dig up this whole area for a mine, but the few locals who lived here wouldn't budge and they gave up.
textByHash.ecea130221f66166217461ec8970696b563cde82: Hello adventurer, how's your treasure hunt going?
textByHash.04e34031e0e93f4f674bbc9a129e822084103da7: No adventurer stays here this long just to sight see. But your business is yours alone, if you need to use the raft go ahead. But please try not crash it this time!
textByHash.366151186fa0c608334dcc109b9eaf92100bce88: No adventurer stays here this long just to sight see. But your business is yours alone, if you need to use the raft go ahead. But please try not to crash it this time!
